main_quest.name: 23km on the 23rd
main_quest.notes: 15 training runs by June 5th birthday. ~3 runs/week over 5 weeks. Culminates in 23km birthday run.

quests.name: 6am Morning Workout
quests.notes: Workout-first habit. Wake around 6am, workout done before 8-8:15am. Assume done every day unless logged as missed. No pure rest days — minimum mobility (30min) counts as done. A rest day is only excused if truly unavoidable (injury flare forcing full rest, illness). Don't be rigid about exact time — spirit is early morning workout before the workday.

quests.name: Strength & Mobility
quests.notes: Home strength and mobility sessions. Log each session completed. Target: 3x per week.
